discovery_instructions: Identify what the main item/entity is for this feature (e.g., employee record, document, invitation)
Look for list/table views - the rows represent the primary entity
Check page headers and breadcrumbs for entity naming
Note the singular and plural forms used in the UI

find_trigger: Look for buttons with: + Add, + Create, + New, plus icon
Check top-right corner of the page
Look in empty state messages for create prompts
create.validation: New item appears in list with unique identifier

find_trigger: Click on any row in a list/table
Look for 'View' or eye icon buttons
Check if rows are clickable (cursor changes)
read.validation: Detail panel, modal, or page opens showing full information

find_trigger: Look for Edit button, pencil icon
Check for inline editing (click on field to edit)
Look for status change dropdowns or buttons
Check action menus (three-dot menu) for edit option
update.validation: Changes persist after save, reflected in list view

find_trigger: Look for Delete button, trash icon
Check action menus (three-dot menu) for delete option
Look for bulk delete with checkboxes
Some features use 'Archive' or 'Cancel' instead of delete
delete.validation: Item removed from list or status changed to deleted/archived

instructions: Navigate to the feature's main section using the navigation_map
Take a full page snapshot to understand the layout
Find ALL clickable elements: buttons, links, tabs, dropdowns, icons
Map the navigation structure: tabs, sidebar items, breadcrumbs
Click each tab/sub-section and document what appears
Locate CRUD controls for the primary entity
Check for action menus (three-dot menus, right-click menus)
Document any modals, dialogs, slide-out panels
Identify form fields and input types when forms appear
Look for filters, search, sort, and export options
Check for bulk action controls (checkboxes, select all)
Note any settings or configuration options
discovery_targets: List/table of items with row actions

content_clusters.consolidation_notes: Articles cover two addition workflows: (1) requesting new employee additions with document submission and tracking, (2) assigning already-insured members to existing policies. PRDs enrich with AI automation for document verification, configurable admin panel for insurer-specific requirements, conditional document logic, and multi-emirate support. React migration PRD restructures flow into 3 steps with improved UX.
Articles document employee-facing workflows for adding and removing dependents from insurance. PRDs provide conditional document logic and 3-step flow structure applicable to dependent workflows.
Articles document tracking workflows for both addition and removal requests, including status stages, effective dates, and COI downloads. PRD adds TAT configuration and payment status tracking.

Article covers resubmission workflow when endorsements require additional or corrected documents. PRD enriches with AI-assisted document verification and error handling (re-upload, manual verify, ignore options).

product_context.title: PRD Endorsement AI Automation V1
product_context.why_built: Endorsements (employee additions and removals from insurance) are the most common administrative tasks for health insurance clients, processing approximately 2600 monthly. Manual processing is time-consuming and error-prone. AI automation can verify endorsement documents and extract data automatically, reducing processing time and improving accuracy. Target: 85% processed with zero human intervention and 95% quality rate.
key_design_decisions: AI verification indicator displays with 'Learn more' link to explain AI process
If AI verification fails, user has three options: Re-upload, Verify manually (with pre-filled AI data), or Ignore and continue (with delay warning)
Claude AI unreachable: auto-default to manual verification method
Document order standardized: 1. Passport 2. Visa 3. Emirates ID 4. Others
Sponsor matching required for employee additions only (not dependents) - compare establishment card with visa sponsor
Passport MRZ extraction preferred for standardization (known Syrian passport issues)

product_context.title: PRD - Phase 1 - Expanding endorsements to other insurers
product_context.why_built: Create a flexible admin panel configuration system for endorsement requirements per insurer. Phase 1 moves Top 5 insurers' configuration from hardcoded to configurable setup. Internal team can configure Addition Details, Addition Documents, Removals, and Templates without code changes.
key_design_decisions: Admin panel configuration per provider enables/disables endorsements for companies
Addition Details: configurable fields (Show Field=Yes/No) vs non-configurable standard fields
Addition Documents: predefined sections (Passport, Photo, Visa, Change Status, Emirates ID) can be set as required/conditional
Custom document sections can be added beyond predefined sections
Removals configuration: enable card number/visa cancellation inputs, add removal sections with document types
Templates: upload per document type with helper text and {Member name} placeholder support
Only one configuration per policy type per insurer

product_context.title: PRD - Phase 2 - Expanding endorsements to other insurers
product_context.why_built: Expand endorsement configuration capabilities beyond Top 5 insurers to include remaining insurers (DNIRC, Generali, Morgan Price, Al Ain Ahlia-Expacare, Oriental Insurance). Create common census formats for additions and removals, add new document types and configurable fields, set TAT configurations, and enable payment tracking for endorsements across all insurers.
key_design_decisions: Census format selection for insurer (addition and removal) - different formats per insurer
New configurable detail fields: COC Date, Visa Issue Date, Date of Marriage, Date Entered Country, Date of Hire, Sponsored By
New document sections: Certificate of Continuity, Undertaking Letter for Infants, Health Declaration Form, Basma Form
TAT (Turn Around Time) configuration per policy type for additions and removals
Census download templates in correct format per insurer
Payment required status tracking integrated with endorsement workflow
Date field validation: COC Date, Visa Issue Date, Date of Marriage, Date Entered Country must be today or past; Date of Hire within 30 days future or past

product_context.title: Endorsement - Addition Flow React Migration - PRD
product_context.why_built: Migrate endorsement addition flow to React with improved UX by restructuring from 2 steps to 3 steps: (1) Required Documents, (2) Member Details, (3) Additional Documents. Introduce document status tracking ('Not Complete'/'Complete') and collapsible document cards to help users easily capture uploaded vs remaining documents.
key_design_decisions: 3-step flow structure: Step 1 (Required Documents), Step 2 (Member Details), Step 3 (Additional Documents)
Document status tracking: 'Not Complete' (default) → 'Complete' (when uploaded) → reverts to 'Not Complete' if removed
Collapsible document cards: collapsed by default to organize flow
Auto-population: Employee personal details and work details filled from employee profile if available
OCR integration: Document details (Emirates ID, Passport No, UID, Resident file number) detected from uploaded documents in Step 1
Step 1 shows required documents only; Step 3 shows conditional and optional documents
Users must complete each step before proceeding to next

product_context.title: PRD Endorsement Conditional Documents
product_context.why_built: Reduce endorsement errors and back-and-forth communication by implementing conditional document requirements that dynamically become mandatory based on employee conditions (age, pregnancy, gender). Address main MAF (Medical Application Form) error causes: wrong template usage and documents becoming required due to specific conditions.
key_design_decisions: Conditional questions: yes/no format, assigned to Female or Male employees
One 'Yes' answer = document becomes mandatory
If all answers are 'No', document upload component hides (not required)
Conditional guidance text displayed with questions
MAF template versioning with release date notifications
Questions only configurable for 'Not Required' documents (cannot add to already-required documents)
Gender-based visibility: questions assigned to Female only visible for Female employees, same for Male

product_context.title: AUD Endorsement Opportunity Assessment
product_context.why_built: Enable Abu Dhabi-based clients to submit insurance endorsement requests (additions/deletions) through the platform instead of via email. Guide users through required documents based on specific parameters to reduce back-and-forth communication with endorsement team, decrease turnaround time (TAT), and prevent late addition penalties. Support company strategic objective to expand into Abu Dhabi market.
key_design_decisions: Platform-based submission replaces email-based process (endorsement@bayzat.com)
System guides users on specific documents required based on endorsement parameters
Document completeness validation prevents incomplete submissions
Fast processing critical to avoid late addition penalties for customers
Feature supports Abu Dhabi market penetration strategy

product_context.title: PRD - AUD Online Endorsement
product_context.why_built: Enable online endorsement requests for Abu Dhabi insurance policies, replacing the current email-based process that causes delays and back-and-forth communication. Allow endorsement team to configure different document requirements per emirate (Abu Dhabi vs Dubai, RAK, Al Fujeirah, Sharjah) and per insurance provider.
key_design_decisions: Multiple configurations per provider: same provider may need different requirements for Abu Dhabi vs Dubai
Default configuration: all providers have default config called 'UAE - Dubai, RAK, Al Fujeirah, Sharjah' with existing settings
New configurations: not enabled by default when created; must explicitly enable
Emirate-specific requirements: Abu Dhabi may differ from other emirates
Audit trail: track who created configuration and when updated
Phase 1 scope: admin panel requirements only in initial phase

detected_integrations.description: Source of employee and dependent information; auto-populates personal details, work details, and health card data in endorsement forms. Endorsement changes (additions/removals) update employee profile insurance status.
Core system managing insurance policies and member assignments. Endorsements add/remove employees and dependents from active policies. Tracks policy assignments and member status.
Handles document submission, storage, and retrieval for endorsements. Supports AI verification of documents (Passport, Visa, Emirates ID). Stores verified documents and extracted data.
Sends notifications for endorsement status changes, missing documents ('Attention Required'), and completion. Replaces email-based endorsement submission process (endorsement@bayzat.com).
Central hub for configuring endorsement requirements per insurer and emirate. Controls which documents are required/conditional, detail fields, TAT, templates, and census formats.

Performs document verification and data extraction for Passport, Visa, and Emirates ID. Extracts MRZ data, UID, file numbers, and validates against rules. Auto-defaults to manual verification if unreachable.
Used for sponsor matching on employee additions. AI compares visa sponsor with establishment card to validate employee-sponsor relationship.

Integrates employee removal with departure process. When removal reason is not 'Transferring to New Policy', offboarding option available. Offboarded employees lose Bayzat access after departure date.
Centralized management of insurance policy changes. Tracks request stages (Under Review, With Insurer, Attention Required, Completed), effective dates, TAT, and payment status.
Tracks endorsement status including 'Awaiting Client Payment' state. Integrates payment tracking with endorsement workflow.
Generates census templates in insurer-specific formats for additions and removals. Supports different census formats per emirate and insurer.
Controls gradual rollout of AI automation and new endorsement features. Enables/disables features for specific companies or globally.

check_instructions: Navigate to Automations in the left sidebar
Click + Create workflow (or similar create button)
In trigger selection, search for this feature's name
Check if this feature appears as a trigger source
Document any trigger events found (e.g., 'item created', 'status changed')
Check Actions section for actions related to this feature
Look for 'Approval' or 'Pending Approval' status in the feature
Check if items have approval workflow indicators
Look for 'Submit for Approval' buttons or actions
Find approval settings in feature configuration
Document the approval chain (who approves what)
Test approval/rejection flow if test data available
Check for approval history or audit trail

what_to_do.task: Request and submit new employee additions to health insurance
steps: Navigate to Endorsements tab or Employee Profile
Click 'New Addition' or 'Add to Insurance'
Select submission method (from Endorsement Tab or Employee Profile)
Select employee to add
Upload required documents (Passport, Visa, Emirates ID per insurer configuration)
AI verification processes documents automatically; if verification fails, choose to re-upload, manually verify, or ignore with warning
Fill in member details (Personal details, Document details, Work details)
Review auto-populated fields from employee profile and OCR extraction
Add optional or conditional documents if applicable
Answer conditional questions (yes/no) to determine if additional documents become mandatory
Complete 'Anything else?' section with additional notes
Save as draft or submit endorsement request
Track endorsement status in Endorsements > Additions tab
what_to_do.expected_outcome: Employee addition request submitted with all required documents and details. AI verification reduces manual effort; conditional logic ensures correct documents are collected upfront. Status tracked from submission through completion with estimated effective date visible.
rules_and_constraints: Endorsement can be submitted from two locations: Endorsement Tab or Employee Profile
All required documents per insurer configuration must be uploaded before submission
Conditional documents become mandatory if user answers 'Yes' to any conditional question
Documents determined per insurer/plan via admin panel configuration
For employee additions: sponsor must match establishment card (AI validates)
Visa issue date or hire date must be selected before document upload
All document statuses must show 'Complete' before proceeding to next step
Users can save draft endorsement requests and complete later
Effective dates may change; users notified via info icon
COI can be downloaded within 30 days of completion
Must upload specific documents based on dependent type
Must have valid relationship documentation (marriage/birth certificates)
Must have employee's health card if dependent is sponsored by employee
If documents were previously uploaded during employee profile creation, no need to re-upload
Users can save drafts of endorsement requests
Must complete submission by clicking 'Continue Submission'
Users must provide details when removing a dependent
Can save drafts of requests and complete later
Should be aware of expected turnaround times (TATs)
Requests go through 4 specific stages: Under Review, With Insurer, Attention Required, Removal Completed
Users must provide complete documentation
When removing an employee with dependents, all documents for both employee and dependents must be uploaded
Dependents cannot remain on a policy after the principal member is removed
Offboarding option available when removal reason is not 'Transferring to New Policy'
Offboarded employees lose Bayzat access after departure date
Users can save drafts of endorsement requests to complete later
Must provide removal details before submission
edge_cases: AI verification unreachable: system auto-defaults to manual verification method
Syrian passport: known MRZ issues - passport number in unusual location; system offers manual verification option
Document pre-uploaded: AI verification starts on page load
Wrong document type uploaded: system shows 'Verify manually' option
Name/sponsor mismatch: system shows 'Ignore and continue' option with delay warning
Unreadable document: system prompts re-upload or manual verification
OCR detection failure: fields not detected remain empty for manual entry
Employee profile gaps: not all fields may be available for auto-population
Document removal: status must revert to 'Not Complete' when uploaded document is removed
Provider variations: required document list varies by insurance provider configuration
Documents previously uploaded: system recognizes and allows skipping re-upload
User saves draft: can return later to complete submission
Conditional document logic: system correctly filters questions by dependent type and employee gender
Effective date changes: system notifies via info icon
Turnaround time exceeded: user should email endorsements@bayzat.com
Missing documents: may halt the removal process
Employee has dependents: system requires documents for all members
Offboarding selected: triggers employee access removal after departure date

source_articles.title: How to request and track additions of employees to health insurance on Bayzat
How to add employee dependents to your insurance
How to remove employee dependents from your health insurance
How to remove employees from your health insurance

what_to_do.task: Assign already-insured members to existing health insurance policies
steps: Navigate to Employee Profile
Click on Health Insurance section
Click on 'Marked as already insured'
Select the relevant insurance plan from available options
Review plan details
Click 'Continue' to assign the policy
Confirm policy assignment
what_to_do.expected_outcome: Already-insured member successfully assigned to existing health insurance policy on platform. Member now appears in policy records and can be tracked through endorsement system.
rules_and_constraints: Member must already be insured but not yet assigned to a specific policy on the platform
Only existing insurance plans can be selected for assignment
Assignment is immediate upon confirmation
edge_cases: Member already assigned to a policy: system prevents duplicate assignment
No existing policies available: user cannot complete assignment

source_articles.title: How to assign new members to an existing Health Insurance Policy on the platform

what_to_do.task: Configure endorsement requirements per insurance provider and emirate (Admin)
steps: Access Admin Panel > Insurance > Provider > Endorsement Configuration
Select target provider and emirate (e.g., Abu Dhabi, Dubai)
Enable Endorsement toggle for provider
Configure Addition Details: set Show Field=Yes/No for configurable fields (COC Date, Visa Issue Date, Date of Marriage, Date Entered Country, Date of Hire, Sponsored By)
Review non-configurable standard fields
Configure Addition Documents: select policy type and set predefined sections (Passport, Photo, Visa, Change Status, Emirates ID) as required/conditional
Add custom document sections if needed
Configure conditional document questions: add yes/no questions that make documents mandatory based on employee conditions (age, pregnancy, gender)
Add conditional guidance text and upload MAF templates when versions change
Configure Removals: enable card number/visa cancellation inputs, add removal sections with document types
Set TAT (Turn Around Time) for each policy type for additions and removals
Configure Templates: upload templates per document type, add helper text with {Member name} placeholder
Save configuration (new configs disabled by default; explicitly enable when ready)
Review audit info (who created, when updated)
what_to_do.expected_outcome: Endorsement configuration established for provider and emirate. Document requirements, conditional logic, TAT, and templates configured. Customers see appropriate document requirements upfront, reducing back-and-forth communication and delays.
rules_and_constraints: Enable Endorsement must be On for companies to use online endorsements (only for Arya Insurance Brokerage or Prime Insurance Brokers policies)
Only one configuration per policy type per insurer per emirate
Document types can only be used once per configuration
Conditional documents make related detail fields optional (e.g., conditional passport = optional passport number)
Predefined document sections: Passport, Passport Photo, Visa, Change Status, Emirates ID
Helper text can use {Member name} placeholder
Questions only for 'Not Required' documents: cannot add conditional questions for documents already marked as 'Required'
Yes/No answers only: conditional questions can only have binary responses
One 'Yes' = mandatory: if user answers 'Yes' to at least one question, document becomes required
Gender-based visibility: questions assigned to Female only visible for Female employees, same for Male
TAT must be set for all policy types before provider can be enabled
Only 1 TAT per policy type
Date fields validation: COC Date, Visa Issue Date, Date of Marriage, Date Entered Country must be today or past; Date of Hire within 30 days future or past
Details of Other Sponsor limited to 200 characters
New configurable fields default to show=No/Off
Sponsored By field only for employees, not dependents
Census format must be set for both addition and removal before enabling endorsements
edge_cases: Policy type already has configuration: cannot create duplicate; warning dialog required
Deleting configuration: warning dialog required
Document set as conditional but related field still required: system allows but may cause user confusion
Company has no relevant policies: hide endorsements menu
Template upload for document type not enabled: prevent upload
Predefined section marked conditional but user expects required: add guidance text
{Member name} placeholder not replaced correctly: validation on save
Multiple configurations per provider: same provider may need different requirements for Abu Dhabi vs Dubai
Default configuration handling: existing settings preserved in default UAE config
New configuration disabled by default: must explicitly enable after setup

what_to_do.task: Track employee addition requests to health insurance
steps: Navigate to Endorsements section
Click on Additions tab
Locate specific addition request
Check submission date
Check current stage (Under Review, With Insurer, Attention Required, Addition Completed)
Review estimated effective date
Hover over request status to view progress details
If effective date changes, check reason via info icon
If turnaround time exceeded, contact support at endorsements@bayzat.com
Once completed, download Certificate of Insurance (COI) within 30 days
what_to_do.expected_outcome: User has clear visibility into addition request status from submission through completion. Effective date and stage information available. COI downloadable upon completion. User knows when to follow up if TAT exceeded.
rules_and_constraints: COI can be downloaded within 30 days of completion
Users must email endorsements@bayzat.com if turnaround time is exceeded
Must provide employee and company name when contacting support
Requests go through specific stages: Under Review, With Insurer, Attention Required, Addition Completed
Effective dates may change with notification
Requests go through 4 specific stages: Under Review, With Insurer, Attention Required, Removal Completed
Users must provide complete documentation
edge_cases: Potential need for additional documents: system notifies via 'Attention Required' stage
Effective date changes: system notifies via info icon
Turnaround time exceeded: user should email endorsements@bayzat.com
COI download window: only available within 30 days of completion
Missing documents: may halt the removal process

source_articles.title: How to track the status of your addition request online
How to track the status of your removal request online

what_to_do.task: Resubmit documents for endorsement with corrections
steps: Receive email notification about endorsement requiring additional or corrected documentation
Check 'Attention Required' alert in Endorsements section
Click 'View Details' to see endorsement
Review feedback provided by endorsement team
Upload required documents as specified in feedback
If AI verification fails on re-upload, choose to re-upload again, manually verify, or ignore with warning
Ensure all document statuses show 'Complete'
Click 'Submit' to resubmit documents
Track updated endorsement status
what_to_do.expected_outcome: Documents successfully resubmitted with corrections. Endorsement request moves forward in processing. AI verification assists with document validation; if verification fails, user has options to resolve (re-upload, manual verify, or proceed with warning).
rules_and_constraints: Users must upload all documents as specified in the feedback before submission
AI verification processes documents automatically
If AI verification fails, user can choose to re-upload, manually verify, or ignore with warning
All document statuses must show 'Complete' before submission
edge_cases: AI verification unreachable: system auto-defaults to manual verification method
Wrong document type uploaded: system shows 'Verify manually' option
Name/sponsor mismatch: system shows 'Ignore and continue' option with delay warning
Unreadable document: system prompts re-upload or manual verification
Document pre-uploaded: AI verification starts on page load
Syrian passport: known MRZ issues - passport number in unusual location; system offers manual verification option

source_articles.title: How to resubmit documents for an endorsement

execution_order: 2. EXPLORATION - Navigate to feature, discover all UI elements using exploration_phase instructions
3. IDENTIFY ENTITY - Determine the primary item/entity using primary_entity discovery
4. CRUD TEST - Test create, read, update, delete for the primary entity
5. WORKFLOW CHECK - Verify if feature has workflow triggers/actions
6. WHAT_TO_DO - Execute each task from what_to_do array, validate expected outcomes
7. DOCUMENTATION - Capture screenshots of every significant state change
8. REPORT - Generate validation report with pass/fail for each task and issue
